description: zappy.app is used as a branded web front door for Zapier pages about workflow automation, AI tools, and app integrations. The programmatic developer materials visible from it point to Zapier-operated documentation and services on other domains rather than exposing developer surfaces on zappy.app itself.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces could be confirmed on zappy.app itself; the site primarily redirects/brands Zapier marketing pages, while developer docs and integration surfaces belong to other domains such as zapier.com and docs/platform.zapier.com.
